title: taraxacum lahulense
intro: Taraxacum lahulense, also known as Himalayan dandelion or Lahul dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum lahulense include its ability to support liver function and act as a diuretic, which can help with conditions such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine formulations, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
